Package org.skriptlang.skript.bukkit.lang.eventvalue

package org.skriptlang.skript.bukkit.lang.eventvalue
  • Class
    Description
    EventValue<E extends org.bukkit.event.Event,V>
    Describes a single "event value" available in a specific Event context.
    EventValue.Builder<E extends org.bukkit.event.Event,V>
    A builder for creating EventValue instances.
    EventValue.Changer<E extends org.bukkit.event.Event,V>
    A changer for applying modifications to the value for a given event instance.
    EventValue.NoValueChanger<E extends org.bukkit.event.Event,V>
    A changer that does not require a value to be passed (e.g.
    EventValue.Time
    Represents the time state an event value is registered for.
    EventValue.Validation
    Represents the validation status of an event value against an event context.
    EventValueRegistry
    Registry and resolver for EventValue definitions.
    EventValueRegistry.Flag
    Flags used during event value resolution.
    EventValueRegistry.Flags
    A set of EventValueRegistry.Flags.
    EventValueRegistry.Resolution<E extends org.bukkit.event.Event,V>
    Result of a registry resolve operation.
